brief_notes: Exceptionally thorough benchmarking study covering 7 callers, 14 species, 3 basecalling models, and 2 read types -- the most comprehensive bacterial nanopore variant calling benchmark to date. Key findings are well-supported: ONT surpassing Illumina (F1 99.99% vs 99.45% SNP), the indel advantage (99.61% vs 95.76%), and error mode analysis showing repetitive region robustness. Practical recommendations (hac minimum, 10x depth sufficient, Clair3 for deployment) are clinically actionable. Minor weaknesses: some table entries use approximations, duplex results are incomplete for some callers, and Illumina-based truthset circularity is acknowledged but could be addressed with orthogonal validation.
